methodology.buy_rule: A research buy requires a strong trend screen plus acceptable sector-aware quality, valuation, financial-strength, and latest-earnings evidence.
methodology.policy: Research shortlist only. Sell/avoid means review an owned position or avoid a new entry; it is not an instruction to short or trade automatically.

sector_models.banks: P/B and P/E relative to ROE, credit quality and regulatory capital.
sector_models.energy: Normalized multi-year FCF yield, leverage and cycle resilience.
sector_models.reits: P/FFO, AFFO growth, occupancy and debt maturity review.
sector_models.software: Growth, FCF margin, forward P/E, ROIC and dilution review.

methodology.sell_rule: Bottom-quartile score and below both the 50-day and 200-day averages.
methodology.summary: Two-stage screen: cross-sectional trend and momentum for the liquid US universe, followed by SEC filing, earnings, valuation, quality, and balance-sheet research for the visible shortlist.
